fundamentals.name: Astera Labs, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Astera Labs, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells semiconductor-based connectivity solutions for cloud and AI infrastructure. It offers an intelligent connectivity platform, comprised of semiconductor-based, high-speed, mixed-signal connectivity products that integrate a matrix of microcontrollers and sensors, and COSMOS. The company provides COSMOS software suite, a connectivity system management and optimization software that enables management and optimization of resources for large fleets at cloud-scale via link, fleet, and RAS management capabilities. In addition, it offers PCIe/CXL smart DSP retimers and cable modules; ethernet smart cable modules for cloud and AI infrastructure; CXL memory connectivity controllers; and smart fabric switches. The company serves hyperscalers and system original equipment manufacturers. Astera Labs, Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is based in San Jose, California.

judgment.summary: Astera Labs exhibits exceptional growth metrics and high margins, though it trades at a premium valuation and carries significant leverage.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 13.5%; next earnings date is 2026-08-04.
positives: Revenue growth 93.4% YoY and earnings growth 144.4% YoY indicate rapid expansion.
Profit margin 26.7% and operating margin 20.1% demonstrate strong profitability.
Quarterly earnings growth of 152.4% and a positive surprise in the last quarter highlight operational success.
High current and quick ratios (11.30 and 10.55) suggest excellent short-term liquidity.
Free cash flow of $240.00M TTM indicates healthy cash generation.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 208.76 and Forward P/E of 72.95 indicate a very high valuation.
Debt/Equity ratio of 2.80 suggests significant financial leverage.
Analyst mean target of $244.10 is below the current spot price, indicating potential overvaluation according to analysts.
Beta of 3.36 suggests higher volatility compared to the broader market.

news.paragraph: Astera Labs (ALAB) has seen significant positive momentum, with its stock climbing 32% recently following analyst upgrades and mentions from prominent figures like Jim Cramer, who advised to "hold on." The company also recently reported a strong Q1 2026 earnings surprise of 13.5%, with analysts projecting robust growth for the current quarter and fiscal year.
